## How was this tested?

<!-- Check all that apply. -->

- [ ] Unit tests added / updated
- [ ] Manual run of `./loom run "..."` with success
- [ ] `opensource_gate` passes locally (`PYTHONPATH=. python3 -m devkit.gate.opensource .`)
- [ ] Visual / UI verification (if applicable)

## Checklist

- [ ] I read [`CONTRIBUTING.md`](./CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] I read [`CONSTITUTION.md`](./CONSTITUTION.md)
- [ ] My change is **scoped** — one logical change per PR
- [ ] New / changed code has tests
- [ ] I updated docs (README / USAGE / architecture) if behavior changed
- [ ] No new third-party dependency unless justified in the PR body
- [ ] I did not commit `.env`, OAuth tokens, or other secrets
- [ ] I did not commit personal file paths (`/Users/<me>/...`,
      `/home/<me>/...`)
- [ ] Commit messages follow the existing style (run `git log --oneline -10`)
